finalization_model.closeout_rule: Before br close, the signoff bead may be the only non-closed required child. After close, every required Wave2 child bead must be closed.

signoff_rows.unsupported_reason: Direct BrowserRuntime creation inside ServiceWorkerGlobalScope is classified by asupersync-9r5lmo as broker/coordinator-only: browser termination between lifecycle events prevents volatile service-worker memory from owning regions, obligations, scheduler state, cancellation, drain/finalize, and replay evidence as a shipped product surface.
signoff_rows.fallback_target: bounded service-worker broker/handoff path with dedicated-worker and browser-main direct-runtime fallbacks
residual_risks: future direct service-worker runtime promotion would require a new owner bead with browser-lifetime region ownership proof and no silent remapping to browser main-thread or dedicated-worker lanes
